title: Ven (Peace Brigade)
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Youmay|the Peace Brigader|other people named [[Ven (disambiguation)]]}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Ven |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Peace Brigade]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You and Ven grab seats where you can keep an eye on me. But stay put. Don't do anything unless I give a sign.''"
"''Got it.|Reck Desh and Wotson|}} '''Ven''' was a member of the [[Peace Brigade]], a group of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] citizens that cooperated with the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Ven served as [[Reck Desh]]'s [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] alongside a [[Gender/Legends|man]] named [[Wotson]] when Desh, the Peace Brigade's leader, traveled to [[Kuat City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. There, the trio entered the [[Nebula Orchid]] diner to meet an informant, secretly [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]].''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' While Shesh told Desh of a captured [[Elan|Yuuzhan Vong priestess]], Ven and Wotson sat at a nearby table and kept watch. Ven, Desh, and Wotson pursued the informant into the streets after the meeting concluded, but lost sight of the person. ==Behind the scenes== Ven appeared in [[2000]]'s ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', a novel written by [[James Luceno]] as the fourth volume in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Peace Brigaders]]
